boundary_binding.action_boundary: May clinical operations activate the trial site?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No exact match; consent-status class pending and unclosed
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-BOR-082-P requires closed consent-status class before enrollment; AUTH-BOR-082 confirms C12 pending
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082 leave consent C12 pending; STD-BOR-082-P requires closed consent-status class before enrollment
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Consent C12 pending per AUTH-BOR-082; enrollment prerequisite unfulfilled per FEAS-BOR-082

final_answer: Source records confirm activation authority covers site B-18, protocol P8.1, and activation date 2026-06-28 per AUTH-BOR-082. However, consent C12 remains pending according to both AUTH-BOR-082 and FEAS-BOR-082. Policy STD-BOR-082-P mandates a closed consent-status class before enrollment. The action boundary cannot close because the consent-status class dependency remains open, preventing the activation from proceeding.
open_blockers: Consent C12 remains pending per AUTH-BOR-082
